latest_local_audit.head: 9d091ce plus local llama3 prompt-pack follow-on worktree
latest_local_audit.summary: Manifest realigned to the public four-row truth: TinyLlama Q8_0 remains supported; exact Llama 3.2 1B, Llama 3.2 3B, and Llama 3 8B Instruct Q8_0 rows are supported only as short local-chat/parity smoke lanes; broader Llama-family support, longer context, stronger perf/portability, and neighboring rows remain unsupported until row-specific evidence lands. Added Qwen3-1.7B Q8_0 as a supported exact-row ChatML (thinking-disabled) chat/parity smoke lane (token-identical to llama.cpp at 1/5/50); neighboring Qwen3 sizes/variants/quants, MoE, longer context, and thinking-mode remain unsupported.
